title: React Native Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of React Native components (View, Text), the StyleSheet API, and Expo/CLI.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary role of React Native in building apps?
options: To build truly native mobile applications for iOS and Android using JavaScript and React.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which native component in React Native is equivalent to a <div> in the web?
Does React Native use standard CSS files for styling?
options: Yes, you can import .css files directly.
No, it uses a StyleSheet API that accepts a JavaScript object (in camelCase).

questions.question: What is 'Expo' in the context of React Native development?
options: A set of tools and services that makes it easier to start building apps.
A specific component for displaying images.
An alternative to the React framework.

questions.question: React Native allows you to use your React skills to build apps that render as real native UI components on mobile devices.
options: False (it only renders a web view within the app)
